title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Gwalior-based team.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!
